panels.description: Cash + Equity stacked, NAV overlaid as a line. Stacking shows portfolio composition over time; the NAV line confirms NAV = cash + equity.
panels.title: Portfolio decomposition

panels.description: Stacked areas: positive sources (equity, forex, interest, dividends) build up gross P&L (top of positive stack = gross); fees stack below zero. Total net = gross − fees, overlaid as a line.
panels.title: P&L breakdown

panels.description: Latest snapshot per instrument. Direction badge shows long/short/flat. PnL columns colored by sign (gradient red→green). Quantity + last price as inline gauges across the row range.
panels.title: Equity positions — latest per instrument

panels.description: Latest snapshot per cash bucket. Currency badge, gauge bars on values, sign-coloured PnL cells. Total gross / Total net are highlighted on the right.
panels.title: Cash positions — latest per currency

panels.description: Position-size allocation across instruments held as of the end of the dashboard window. Top 10 instruments by position size (quantity × avg cost in base currency); remainder grouped as 'Others'.
panels.title: Instrument allocation

panels.description: Cash vs equity split of portfolio NAV as of the end of the dashboard window.
panels.title: Cash vs equity

list.name: position_filter
list.label: Show
list.query: Open : open, Closed : closed, All : all
